hero.subtitle: ABOUT US
hero.title: Empowering Business Through Intelligent Automation
hero.description: We're on a mission to revolutionize how businesses operate by making powerful automation accessible to everyone. Our AI-driven platform helps companies work smarter, faster, and more efficiently.

mission.subtitle: OUR MISSION
mission.title: Transforming Work Through Innovation
mission.description: At AutomatePro, we believe that every business deserves access to powerful automation tools. We're dedicated to creating solutions that eliminate repetitive tasks, reduce errors, and free up teams to focus on what matters most - innovation and growth.

features.title: Why Choose AutomatePro
features.description: Our platform combines cutting-edge technology with user-friendly design to deliver powerful automation capabilities.

features.title: No-Code Builder
features.description: Create complex automation workflows without writing a single line of code. Our intuitive drag-and-drop interface makes it easy.

features.title: AI-Powered Intelligence
features.description: Advanced machine learning algorithms that adapt and improve your automation workflows over time.

features.title: Global Scale
features.description: Enterprise-grade infrastructure that scales with your business needs, from startup to global enterprise.

features.title: Enterprise Security
features.description: Bank-grade security with SOC 2 compliance, encryption at rest and in transit, and regular security audits.

features.title: Lightning Fast
features.description: High-performance architecture ensuring your automations run at peak efficiency with minimal latency.

features.title: Team Collaboration
features.description: Built-in tools for team collaboration, version control, and workflow management.

team.title: Meet Our Leadership
team.description: The innovative minds behind AutomatePro's mission to transform business automation.

members.name: Sarah Chen
members.bio: Former AI research lead at Google, passionate about making automation accessible to all businesses.

members.bio: 20+ years in enterprise software development, specializing in scalable cloud architecture.

members.bio: PhD in Machine Learning, leading our AI innovation and automation intelligence.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Business?
cta.description: Join thousands of businesses already using AutomatePro to streamline their operations and boost productivity.
